original_prompt: Refactor payment service to use new Stripe API v3. Update webhook handlers and add idempotency keys.

decision_trace.decision: Added idempotencyKey to all API calls to prevent duplicate charges on retry — required by Stripe v3 spec
Created new file instead of modifying existing handler to avoid breaking the legacy v2 webhook path still in use
